grafico.title: Cantidad de Horas Extraordinarias en los últimos 30 días

field.label: Extras 50
field.expression: SUM(CASE when (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) > 0 and (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) < FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 then (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) when (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) >= FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 then FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 else 0 end)

field.label: Extras 100
field.expression: SUM(CASE when (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) > FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 then (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) - FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 else 0 end )
